scripts.build:native: cd native && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe && mkdir -p ../dist/native && cp zig-out/lib/libriptide.so ../dist/native/riptide.node && cp src/mock.vcd ../dist/native/ && cp -n src/mock.vcd.sidecar.json ../dist/native/
scripts.build:native:win: node scripts/gen-win-napi-shim.mjs && cd native && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe -Dtarget=x86_64-windows && mkdir -p ../dist/native && cp zig-out/bin/riptide.dll ../dist/native/riptide-win.node && cp src/mock.vcd ../dist/native/ && cp -n src/mock.vcd.sidecar.json ../dist/native/
scripts.build:native:mac: cd native && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe -Dtarget=aarch64-macos && mkdir -p ../dist/native && cp zig-out/lib/libriptide.dylib ../dist/native/riptide.node && cp src/mock.vcd ../dist/native/ && cp -n src/mock.vcd.sidecar.json ../dist/native/
scripts.build: pnpm wgsl-check && pnpm build:native && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build-ui.mjs
scripts.dev:ui: pnpm wgsl-check && pnpm build:native && node scripts/dev-ui.mjs
scripts.dev:mac: cd native && zig build -Doptimize=ReleaseSafe && mkdir -p ../dist/native && cp zig-out/lib/libriptide.dylib ../dist/native/riptide.node && cp src/mock.vcd ../dist/native/ && cp -n src/mock.vcd.sidecar.json ../dist/native/ && cd .. && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node scripts/build-ui.mjs && electron .
